---
format:
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      x: 1.5cm
      y: 1.2cm
    fontsize: 9pt
    mainfont: Helvetica
    include-in-header: _typst_header.typ
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
source("../shiny/R/logic.R")
d   <- hours_load()
m   <- hours_metrics(d$ledger, d$contingency)
f45 <- find_hours(45, d$ledger, d$contingency)
f90 <- find_hours(90, d$ledger, d$contingency)

fence <- strrep("`", 3)
lets <- sprintf(paste0(
  "#let planned = %d\n#let cont = %d\n#let eac = %d\n#let findable = %d\n",
  "#let netslack = %d\n",
  "#let f45slack = %d\n#let f45cont = %d\n#let f45left = %d\n#let f45verdict = [%s]\n",
  "#let f90short = %d\n#let f90verdict = [%s]\n"),
  m$planned, m$contingency, m$eac, m$findable, m$net_slack,
  f45$from_slack, f45$from_cont, f45$contingency_left, f45$verdict,
  f90$shortfall, f90$verdict)

body <- readLines("_onepager_layout.typ")
block <- paste0(fence, "{=typst}\n", lets, paste(body, collapse = "\n"), "\n", fence, "\n")
```

```{r emit, results='asis'}
cat(block)
```
